name: rideshare-app
description: End-to-end ride-hailing platform — Uber driver matching system design, built from scratch.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:wait && npm run db:migrate
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "loc,match,price,trip,notif" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,blue,magenta" "npm run dev -w services/location-service" "npm run dev -w services/matching-service" "npm run dev -w services/pricing-service" "npm run dev -w services/trip-service" "npm run dev -w services/notification-service"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "loc,match,price,trip,notif,rider,driver" "npm run dev -w services/location-service" "npm run dev -w services/matching-service" "npm run dev -w services/pricing-service" "npm run dev -w services/trip-service" "npm run dev -w services/notification-service" "npm run dev -w frontend/rider-app" "npm run dev -w frontend/driver-app"
scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d redis postgres zookeeper kafka
